title: China’s New AI Is 6X More Efficient Than Claude
summary: Moonshot AI released Kimi K2.7 Code, an open-weight model designed for coding agents that work with real codebases. The model is positioned as an efficient alternative to closed-source coding systems.
writeup: The video covers Moonshot AI's release of Kimi K2.7 Code, an open-weight model built for coding agents that operate on real codebases. It positions the model as an efficient alternative to closed-source coding systems, with the title claiming a 6X efficiency advantage over Claude. The takeaway: a Chinese lab is shipping open weights aimed squarely at the agentic coding workload, where models read and modify existing projects rather than generate isolated snippets.
